overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle flies between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon lights, executing a right turn before descending into a narrow urban canyon. High-quality game engine footage with atmospheric lighting and weather effects.

events.description: begins gradual right bank to navigate around city structures

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle forward through open airspace between illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with vertical green neon lights running up the facade
distinctive pointed spire visible in the distance between buildings
modern glass building with twisted architectural design

segments.scene_description: Flying through open airspace above a futuristic city at night, with a prominent green-lit skyscraper on the left and various illuminated towers ahead. The vehicle maintains steady forward motion while beginning a gradual turn to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: airspace during banking maneuver between districts

events.description: executing sharp right bank turn around city structures
approaching narrow canyon between buildings, POSEIDON billboard visible on right

agents.ego_description: banking right while maintaining altitude, navigating around skyscrapers with city lights passing below

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with blue 'POSEIDON' text on the right side of the flight path
narrow gap between tall buildings forming an urban canyon ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a sharp right bank turn, revealing new sections of the cityscape. The green neon tower falls behind as a large POSEIDON billboard comes into view on the right, signaling the approach to a narrow aerial corridor between skyscrapers.

events.description: descending while maintaining forward speed through the urban canyon
following red tail lights of vehicle traffic ahead in the canyon

agents.ego_description: flying through a narrow urban canyon, descending between closely packed illuminated skyscrapers while following traffic

notable_agents.action: distant flying vehicle with red tail lights moving ahead in the same direction through the canyon

entered.detail: tall building facade forming the left wall of the narrow flight corridor
tall building facade forming the right wall of the narrow flight corridor
red lights from other vehicles visible ahead in the canyon

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers, the vehicle descends while following the red tail lights of traffic ahead. The POSEIDON billboard disappears behind as the canyon walls close in on both sides, creating a confined flight path through the illuminated city architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that transitions from open urban airspace into a confined, descending plunge through a narrow skyscraper canyon. It begins with a steady forward glide past a prominent green-lit tower and various illuminated skyscrapers under a night sky. As the vehicle executes a sharp right bank turn, the green tower recedes and a large POSEIDON billboard emerges on the right, signaling a shift toward a tighter aerial corridor. The scene then narrows as the vehicle descends into a deep urban canyon, following the red tail lights of traffic ahead while the surrounding architecture closes in on both sides.
